description: CompositionPurple printed kurta made of 98% polyester and 2% lycra, has a modified bateau keyhole neckline with purple tape detailing, sleeveless with inner hem tape and split side hemsFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outEthnic is back with a bang in the form of this printed purple kurta from w!
